signals.headline: Ethereum ETFs Record 4th Straight Day of Inflows on April 14, Totaling $212M Streak; ETH Hits $2,400 High | YES | HIGH c
signals.raw:
Ethereum ETFs Record 4th Straight Day of Inflows on April 14, Totaling $212M Streak; ETH Hits $2,400 High | YES | HIGH confidence** [1][3]

U.S. spot Ethereum ETFs saw $53M net inflows on April 14, led by Fidelity ($38M) and BlackRock ($10.5M), with no outflows across funds, marking April's $171M positive shift after prior losses [1]. Ethereum price reached $2,400—a two-month high—amid 41% weekly
